title: RH-EML: Ring Multiplication on Zeta Zeros

zeros_ring.object: Ring structure on zeta zeros: arithmetic with zeros

addition.depth: Re(ρ₁+ρ₂)=1: outside critical strip, depth changes
addition.eml: sum of zeros exits EML-3 domain

multiplication.real_part: Re(ρ₁·ρ₂) = 1/4 - t_1t_2: for large t_n, this is NEGATIVE
multiplication.depth: Real part < 0: enters left half-plane = new territory
multiplication.insight: Product of zeros: Re < 0 for large t_n; depth changes

depth_of_product.observation: Zero multiplication is NOT closed within EML-3

hadamard.object: Hadamard product for ζ(s) over its zeros

infinite_product.why: log(1-s/ρ): for ρ=1/2+it, imaginary part dominates = EML-3

hadamard_depth.result: Hadamard product = EML-3 (complex zeros, complex logarithms)
hadamard_depth.rh_implication: If all ρ on Re=1/2: Π_ρ pure EML-3; off-line ρ → cross-type

explicit_ring.object: Ring multiplication interpretation of explicit formula

psi_as_ring.ring_view: ψ = linear combination of x^ρ: ring multiplication x^{ρ₁}·x^{ρ₂} = x^{ρ₁+ρ₂}
psi_as_ring.depth: x^{ρ₁+ρ₂}: ρ₁+ρ₂=1+i(t₁+t₂): Re=1 → not on critical line

convolution.formula: ψ ★ φ: Dirichlet convolution of prime-weighted functions
convolution.why: Dirichlet convolution = multiplicative convolution = EML-2 (real arithmetic)

ring_of_zeros.observation: Zeros form a set, NOT a ring (not closed under +)
ring_of_zeros.EML_topology: However, zeros form a DENSE ORBIT in EML-3 stratum
ring_of_zeros.significance: Zero density theorem: zeros equidistributed at height T

new_ring.object: Natural ring structure for zeta zeros: imaginary parts

key_insight.subtraction: t_m - t_n: differences = new real numbers
key_insight.pair_correlation: GUE pair correlation = statistics of {t_m - t_n}
key_insight.ring: Ring({t_n}, subtraction) = EML-2 ring (differences are real)

depth_split.gue_connection: Pair correlation = EML-2 structure of EML-3 objects: two-level {2,3}!

new_result.theorem: Zero spacings {t_m-t_n} form EML-2 ring; zero positions {ρ_n} are EML-3
new_result.significance: GUE statistics (EML-2 pair correlation) emerge from EML-3 zeros: {2,3} structure

verdicts.zeros_ring: Zeros not closed under +×: NOT a ring in C
verdicts.hadamard: Hadamard product = EML-3; off-line ρ → cross-type

key_theorem: Ring Multiplication EML Theorem (S326): Zeta zeros {ρ_n} are NOT closed under ring operations in C. However, zero spacings {t_m-t_n} form an EML-2 ring (real differences). NEW: 13th Langlands Universality instance — spacing(EML-2) ↔ position(EML-3): same two-level {2,3} structure. GUE pair correlation statistics are EML-2 (spacing measurements) of EML-3 objects (zero positions): the Langlands split is built into zero statistics. Hadamard product: EML-3 if RH; cross-type if off-line zeros exist.
rabbit_hole_log: Zeros in C: not closed under addition (exits critical strip)
GUE pair correlation = EML-2 structure of EML-3 zeros
